sections.heading: Issue
sections.body: Produce a first-pass internal memo about parties, obligations, deadlines, signatures, and data-quality flags from these scanned filings.

sections.heading: Case Caption
sections.body:
- The reviewed materials include an SEC filing identified as Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X, Appointment of Agent for Service of Process and Undertaking, associated with file sec_vprr_02000258.pdf. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_6580aa526904`
- The reviewed materials also include a Form D notice of sale of securities for Stella Station Trust in file sec_vprr_07040010.pdf. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_bd552f3532ba`

citation_quotes.295c87b911042976:fields: document_type: Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X, Appointment of Agent for Service of Process and Undertaking
citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0: FORM D NOTICE OF SALE OF SECURITIES PURSUANT TO REGULATION D

sections.heading: Parties
sections.body:
- For the Form F-X-derived filing, the filer/issuer is identified as Kabushiki Kaisha Asahi Ginko. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_f10514c6025c`
- For the Form F-X-derived filing, the U.S. agent for service of process is identified as Eiji Ohashi, General Manager of The Asahi Bank, Ltd. New York Branch. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_241cf0fb1101`
- For the Form F-X-derived filing, the signatory for the filer is identified as Mr. Hideki Fukushima, Chief Deputy General Manager. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_1e3e94b83a2f`
- The Form D issuer is Stella Station Trust. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_39f15fa1890f`
- Stella Station Trust lists its executive office address as 11690 Grooms Road, Cincinnati, OH 45242, and telephone number as 513 554 1110. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_59c4532adb37`

citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0: Name of Issuer: Stella Station Trust

sections.heading: Documents Reviewed
sections.body:
- The Form D filing bears barcode/serial number 07040010. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_b1041edc036d`
- The Form F-X-derived filing is associated with related Form CB, file number 5-51260, and barcode/reference 02000258. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_faa7a74f5a08`

citation_quotes.295c87b911042976:fields: Related filing: Form CB; file number 5-51260; barcode/reference 02000258

sections.heading: Procedural Posture
sections.body:
- The Form F-X-derived filing states that the related Form CB filing date was January 10, 2002, the document was signed January 24, 2002, and SEC received/processed stamps were January 29, 2002. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_bc61ecee3932`
- The Form D filing is marked as a new filing, not an amendment. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_9673a5200c59`
- The Form D filing is marked as relying on Rule 506, with Rule 504, Rule 505, Section 4(6), and ULOE unchecked. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_22bee16b6242`

citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0: Type of Filing: New Filing [checked] Amendment [unchecked]

sections.heading: Material Facts
sections.body:
- Stella Station Trust describes its business as purchasing, holding, leasing, managing, selling, exchanging, redeveloping, subdividing, and improving real property and interests in real property. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_0375f34997bf`
- Stella Station Trust is marked as a business trust. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_62eb459684da`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D indicates that the issuer had not sold, and did not intend to sell, to non-accredited investors in the offering. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_96168605b922`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D states that the minimum investment accepted from any individual was $0.00. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_6db688edda41`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D indicates that joint ownership of a single unit was not permitted. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_129282a6cf42`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D lists no person paid or given commission or similar remuneration for solicitation of purchasers in connection with sales of securities in the offering. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_0aa39322ea0b`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D reports non-accredited investor purchases as zero investors and $0.00 aggregate dollar amount of purchases. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p4:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_d10cd4dbe837`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D reports $10,400.00 as an amount of purchases in the excerpted offering information. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p4:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_eb26bcee0db9`
- The Stella Station Trust Form D reports $0.00 for transfer agent fees, printing and engraving costs, legal fees, accounting fees, engineering fees, sales commissions, other expenses, and total expenses. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p4:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_84f1a733b2d9`
- The Form F-X text states that civil suits, actions, or administrative proceedings may be commenced by service of process upon the agent for service of process, and that such service is to be valid and binding as if personal service had been made. [295c87b911042976:p2:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_017edc1d714d`
- The Form F-X undertaking states that certain filers must appoint a successor agent for service of process and file an amended Form F-X if the filer discharges the agent or the agent is unwilling or unable to accept service on behalf of the filer. [295c87b911042976:p2:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_7e3016463c59`
- One Form F-X provision applies the successor-agent and amended-Form F-X obligation until six years have elapsed from the relevant triggering date stated in the form text. [295c87b911042976:p2:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_4c7c8383f253`
- Another Form F-X provision states that for certain Form 1-A or Regulation A filings, the successor-agent and amended-Form F-X obligation continues until six years have elapsed from the date of the last sale of securities in reliance on the Regulation A exemption. [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_61695fc8523b`
- For certain trustee-status filings, the Form F-X text states that the successor-agent and amended-Form F-X obligation applies while any securities subject to the indenture remain outstanding. [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_03d7c795ff56`
- The Form F-X text states that each filer undertakes to advise the Commission promptly of any change to the agent’s name and address during the applicable period. [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_fd71bd4c3a7e`
- The Form D instructions state that five copies of the notice must be filed with the SEC, one of which must be manually signed. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_7e41806c4dd2`
- The Form D instructions state that copies not manually signed must either be photocopies of the manually signed copy or bear typed or printed signatures. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_25e2b0b794b2`
- The Form D instructions state that a new filing must contain all requested information, while amendments need only report specified issuer/offering information, changes, Part C information, and material changes from information previously supplied in Parts A and B. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_6f2859a378eb`
- The Form D instructions state there is no federal filing fee. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_d7516a564895`
- The Form D instructions list the SEC filing address as U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, 450 Fifth Street, N.W., Washington, D.C. 20549. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_ae09b08e3b5b`

sections.heading: Open Questions
sections.body:
- Document is a scanned image with no text layer; transcription is based on visual reading.
  - claim_id: `claim_ea8f5cda94e7`
- Stamps, handwritten notation, and signatures contain low-confidence or non-verbatim elements.
  - claim_id: `claim_5f7f324d7318`
- Only pages 1 through 5 of a 9-page Form D may be provided; confirm whether pages 6 through 9 are absent from the reviewed packet.
  - claim_id: `claim_37ee06b1a546`
- The evidence indicates some small SEC received stamp text on page 1 is partially unclear, signatures are handwritten and not fully transcribed, and a top stamp on page 1 is partly cut off or unclear. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_16d8daeb74a0`
- Confirm whether the reviewed filings are complete, including whether pages 6 through 9 of the 9-page Form D are missing.
  - claim_id: `claim_ba3ed1b4eccb`
- Confirm all handwritten signatures, handwritten dates, stamps, and marginal notations against the original scans because several are described as unclear or not fully transcribed.
  - claim_id: `claim_f43dfa5c6892`
- Confirm whether all pages lack a text layer and whether the transcription was based solely on OCR or visual reading of scanned images.
  - claim_id: `claim_9f86a6178940`
- Confirm the full six-year triggering date language in the Form F-X provision where the excerpt ends after “until six years have elapsed from the date.”
  - claim_id: `claim_45ddd194e087`
- Confirm any case caption or matter name, because no court case caption or litigation caption is supplied in the evidence.
  - claim_id: `claim_613e60803d88`

evidence.text:
Extracted fields for sec_vprr_02000258.pdf:
amounts_or_deadlines: Undertakings include appointment of successor agent and amended Form F-X obligations for periods including until six years have elapsed from specified triggering dates, depending on the form type; for Form CB, until six years have elapsed following the effective date of the latest amendment to such Form CB.
dates: Date filed for related Form CB: January 10, 2002. Document signed: January 24, 2002. SEC received/processed stamps: January 29, 2002.
document_type: Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X, Appointment of Agent for Service of Process and Undertaking
parties: Filer/issuer: Kabushiki Kaisha Asahi Ginko. U.S. agent for service of process: Eiji Ohashi, General Manager of The Asahi Bank, Ltd. New York Branch. Signatory for filer: Mr. Hideki Fukushima, Chief Deputy General Manager.
recording_references: Related filing: Form CB; file number 5-51260; barcode/reference 02000258; SEC received/processed January 29, 2002.
unclear_items: Small text in SEC received stamp on page 1 is partially unclear; signatures are handwritten and not fully transcribed; top stamp on page 1 partly cut off/unclear.

it is received by the SEC at the address given below or, if received at that address after the date on which it is due, on the date it was mailed by United States registered or certified mail to that address. Where To File: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, 450 Fifth Street, N.W., Washington, D.C. 20549. Copies Required: Five (5) copies of this notice must be filed with the SEC, one of which must be manually signed. Any copies not manually signed must be photocopies of the manually signed copy or bear typed or printed signatures. Information Required: A new filing must contain all information requested. Amendments need only report the name of the issuer and offering, any changes thereto, the information requested in Part C, and any material changes from the information previously supplied in Parts A and B. Part E and the Appendix need not be filed with the SEC. Filing Fee: There is no federal filing fee. State: This notice shall be used to indicate reliance on the Uniform Limited Offering Exemption (ULOE) for sales of securities

B. INFORMATION ABOUT OFFERING 1. Has the issuer sold, or does the issuer intend to sell, to non-accredited investors in this offering? Yes [unchecked] No [checked] Answer also in Appendix, Column 2, if filing under ULOE. 2. What is the minimum investment that will be accepted from any individual? $ 0.00 3. Does the offering permit joint ownership of a single unit? Yes [unchecked] No [checked] 4. Enter the information requested for each person who has been or will be paid or given, directly or indirectly, any commission or similar remuneration for solicitation of purchasers in connection with sales of securities in the offering. If a person to be listed is an associated person or agent of a broker or dealer registered with the SEC and/or with a state or states, list the name of the broker or dealer. If more than five (5) persons to be listed are associated persons of such a broker or dealer, you may set forth the information for that broker or dealer only. Full Name: None Business or Residence Address: [blank] Name of Associated

respect to which filings are made by the Filer with the Commission on Schedule 13E-4F, 14D-1F or 14D-9F; or (iv) the securities in relation to which the Filer acts as trustee pursuant to an exemption under Rule 10a-5 under the Trust Indenture Act of 1939. The Filer stipulates and agrees that any such civil suit or action or administrative proceeding may be commenced by the service of process upon, and that service of an administrative subpoena shall be effected by service upon such agent for service of process, and that service as aforesaid shall be taken and held in all courts and administrative tribunals to be valid and binding as if personal service thereof had been made. The supplied evidence JSON does not include the complete text of every page referenced in the learned data-quality notes.
